form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 10th of 12 at this track on March 13 over 1200m, 13 len behind Lightning Force with 54.5kg at $10.30. Previously second-up 7th of 9 at this track on September 7 over 1200m, 21 len behind Breedo Sol carrying 52.5kg at $15.90. Solid top-three hope.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At big odds at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at this track on January 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Yeoun with 54.5kg at $29.30. Last start 3rd of 10 at this track on March 6 over 1200m, 3 len behind Success Queen carrying 54kg at $12.50. Definite winning chance.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 56-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last of 12 at this track on February 13 over 1200m, 34 len behind The Point carrying 56kg at $66.20. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at this track on September 26 over 1000m, 8 len behind Fantastic Force with 55.5kg at $45.70. Fitter but must improve sharply.
